speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome! I’m glad you’re here to check out this fantastic 2016 Chevrolet Tahoe LT. It’s well-equipped with leather seating, a premium Bose audio system, and third-row capability — perfect for any active family. With only 142,000 miles on it and a proven 5.3L V8 engine, this full-size SUV is ready for your next adventure! We’ve priced it competitively at $24,900, so let's take a closer look!
